name: Applesauce-Cocoa Squares
recipeInstructions:
Recipe by: Sue Klapper Preparation Time: 0:40
Combine flour, sugar, and 1/4 cup of the cocoa with baking powder in a mixing bowl. In a separate bowl, combine milk, applesauce, and vanilla. Stir the wet ingredients into the dry ingredients. Spoon the batter into a greased 8-inch square baking pan. Combine brown sugar, remaining 1/4 cup cocoa, and water. Pour over the batter. Bake at 350°F for 40 minutes. Remove from oven; cool in pan. Cut into squares.
